data.title: Pacific Software, Inc. completes change of control with PurMinds Holdings Inc., secures occupancy at GMP facility.
data.description: On January 19, 2026, in Tallahassee, Florida, Pacific Software, Inc. (OTC: PFSF), operating as PurMinds Enterprises, Inc., confirmed the successful conclusion of its change of control and Reverse Takeover (RTO) deal with PurMinds Holdings Inc. The transaction is now fully complete, marking a significant milestone for the Company. This development signifies a strategic shift in ownership and management for Pacific Software, Inc. as a result of this RTO.

data.title: Join Planet Fitness by Jan 30 for $1 down, $15/month, saving $28 or more. Largest fitness brand with many members.
data.description: For a limited time until January 30th, new members can save over $28 by joining Planet Fitness for just $1 down and a monthly fee of $15. This offer comes from Planet Fitness, a leading fitness center operator with a large and rapidly expanding membership base, surpassing all other fitness brands in member count.

data.title: RSUPPORT Co., Ltd. gains ISO/IEC 27001 and 27017 certifications for security, enhancing trust in their services.
data.description: A top remote solutions provider in Asia has been acknowledged for its exceptional security measures. RSUPPORT Co., Ltd., based in SEOUL, South Korea, shared on Jan. 19, 2026, that its Global R&D Center has received two prestigious international recognitions. The company is renowned in the region for its remote services and has solidified its position as the foremost provider.

data.title: Amentum leads successful Artemis II rollout, moving rocket and capsule from VAB to LC-39B for crewed moon mission.
data.description: In Chantilly, Virginia, Amentum (NYSE: AMTM) reached a significant achievement for NASA's Artemis II mission as they successfully transferred the Space Launch System (SLS) rocket and Orion spacecraft from the Vehicle Assembly Building (VAB) to Launch Complex 39B (LC-39B) at Kennedy Space Center. This pivotal step signifies progress in readying for the crewed Artemis launch. The mission will involve the Orion crew capsule carrying four astronauts on a roughly 10-day journey around the Moon.

data.title: Over 200 Italy-US leaders gather in San Francisco for Italy on the Move during JPM Week to boost biotech and pharma.
data.description: On January 19, 2026, over 200 industry leaders from Italy and the United States, including representatives from biotech, pharmaceuticals, and investment sectors, convened in San Francisco. This gathering marked the ninth edition of Italy on the Move, a side event organized by Italy during JPM Week. The purpose of this event was to enhance collaboration and partnerships within the industry.

data.title: Global Traffic Scorecard 2025 by INRIX analyzes data from 900 cities in 36 countries, showing increased congestion.
data.description: In January 19, 2026, WUHU, China, INRIX, a global traffic data analytics company, unveiled the 2025 Global Traffic Scorecard, which delves into traffic data from more than 900 cities in 36 countries. The report revealed a significant increase in traffic congestion, with [insert specific data if available] cities experiencing severe congestion levels.

data.title: IEEE study on effects of pointing error on QKD systems presented. New framework for modeling error in optical systems. (char: 112)
data.description: A new detailed framework has been introduced by researchers for estimating pointing error in optical wireless systems used in quantum key distribution. This emerging communication technology, known as Quantum key distribution (QKD), operates on principles of quantum mechanics. The framework was unveiled in New York on January 19, 2026. In QKD systems, pointing errors can significantly impact performance. Researchers highlighted the importance of accurately modeling pointing error for optimal system operation. This development is crucial as QKD continues to gain traction in the field of communication technology.

data.title: FixMold launches eco-friendly mold removal products in Miami on Jan 19, 2026. Major milestone reached.
data.description: In Miami on January 19, 2026, Fix Mold Miami, a reputable company focusing on mold remediation and indoor air quality restoration, has unveiled their new eco-friendly line of mold removal and prevention products. This release marks a significant achievement for the company as they aim to address environmental concerns and offer innovative solutions.

data.title: Arizona homeowners warned about thermal shock by West Coast Roofing as winter settles in, causing potential roof damage.
data.description: In Tucson, Arizona on January 19, 2026, West Coast Roofing, LLC, a leading roofing contractor in the region, released a public announcement concerning the concerning issue of "thermal shock." This silent yet harmful occurrence becomes prevalent as winter temperatures grip the state, potentially causing damage to properties.

data.title: Drivers may still get charged with a DUI in the morning after drinking. Most are unaware of this risk.
data.description: In Wichita, Kansas, on January 14, 2026, it is common knowledge for drivers not to drive under the influence of alcohol, but many fail to consider the risks the morning after. Despite feeling clear-headed upon waking up and assuming that the effects of alcohol have disappeared, there is still a lingering danger.

data.title: Tether collaborates with UN to tackle crypto crime in Africa, focusing on cybersecurity and human trafficking prevention in six nations.
data.description: Tether, the issuer of USDT, has revealed a collaborative effort with UNODC aimed at advancing cybersecurity education and combatting human trafficking in six African countries. This joint initiative aims to address critical issues by focusing on enhancing cybersecurity awareness and prevention of human trafficking in the region.

data.title: Oil companies weighing investment in Venezuela face challenge of balancing quick, reliable payback with Trump's push for more risk.
data.description: For quite some time, the industry has focused on projects that offer rapid and dependable returns on investments. However, there is now a push by Trump for a shift towards prioritizing ventures that involve some level of risk.
